title: Enchantment Tooltips
description: Sick of having to open your inventory and move your cursor to your tool just to read its enchantments?  Well, this mod solves that problem by displaying a HUD of a list of enchantments that are on an item or book when you select it in your hotbar!
body:
# Enchantment Tooltips Mod

## Info

This client-side mod adds a HUD onto your screen for a brief moment (or forever if you want to configure it to do so) to see the list of enchantments that are on an item or book when you select it in your hotbar.

To use this mod, download the mod it and move it to your ```.minecraft/mods``` folder.  Additionally, you will need to install the Fabric API jar for this mod to work.

This mod is configurable if you use [ShadowHunter22's Config Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/shadowhunter22s-config-library/).  When installed, this menu can be opened by pressing ```I```, or reassigned to your liking through the game's keybind menu.

## Features

- Very simple: a HUD to see the list of enchantments that are on an item or book when you select it in your hotbar.

This mod has the following configuration options:

- HUD enabled (also assigned to a keybind [`O`]) `(default: true)`
- Change HUD display location `(default: Top Left)`
- Always display the HUD `(default: false)`
- Render the enchanted books onto the screen with the enchantment name `(default: true) `

- For versions 1.21 and later, [Enchantment Text Styling](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-text-styling) is needed to show the custom text styling for enchantments, if other mods use them to style their enchantments' text.

## Dependencies

- [Optional] ShadowHunter22's Config Library
- [Optional] Mod Menu

## Versions

This mod is **Fabric** ONLY.  There is no plan to support Forge.

This mod is available for the following Minecraft versions:

`1.20`
`1.20.1`
`1.20.2`
`1.20.3`
`1.20.4`
`1.20.5`
`1.20.6`

`1.21`
`1.21.1`
`1.21.2`
`1.21.3`
`1.21.4`

## Client and Server Support

This is a client-side only mod.
